rationale: Both correctly diagnose the config/tokenizer mismatch and cite the same crash site, matching the thread's resolution and workaround verbatim. X goes further with a concrete, drop-in null-safe patch and explicitly flags what it hasn't verified (generation quality on DiT path), staying tightly grounded in confirmed facts. Y adds several specifics not established in the thread — a named PR title/purpose for #2713, an unconfirmed 'NPU hardware' claim for FayeSpica's test, and a 4-row config table listing i2t/t2t yamls never mentioned — which reads as embellishment beyond the evidence and weakens grounding, while also offering a vaguer, less actionable fix.
